pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires this filename.
Standard Windows directories for saving files in this environment.
Oracle Analytics documentation confirms TimestampDiff with SQL_TSI_DAY is the standard function for date difference. The task hint explicitly suggests this.
Task description explicitly dictates these columns for the bar chart.
Task description explicitly requires changing the aggregation method from Sum to Average.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires saving a workbook named "Shipping_Delay_Analysis.dva". The data is expected to contain "Region" and a calculated "Days to Ship" column. The date difference calculation in Oracle Analytics typically uses the "TimestampDiff" function with the "SQL_TSI_DAY" interval. The agent must change the aggregation for the new metric to "Average" (avg) to correctly visualize shipping delays by Region.
